title: Elevate Quantum and Partners Launch Nation’s First Quantum Open Architecture System in Record Time – Elevate Quantum
why:
- The Quantum Platform for the Advancement of Commercialization (Q-PAC) is the nation’s first commercially deployable Quantum Open Architecture system.
- Q-PAC advanced from concept to full operation in just five months, making it the fastest quantum infrastructure deployment ever completed in the United States.
- The system uses the open, modular Quantum Utility Block (QUB) architecture, allowing rapid and cost-effective deployment compared to closed, full-stack quantum systems.
- Q-PAC provides a complete quantum computing stack, from processors and control electronics to cryogenic infrastructure and advanced calibration and optimization software, enabling enterprise users to access and test commercial-grade quantum capabilities.
- The platform launches with a 17-qubit quantum processing unit, with a clear upgrade path to 100-qubit-class processors, supporting scalability without infrastructure replacement.
- Q-PAC integrates both quantum and classical computing resources, offering hybrid compute capabilities via a GPU-cluster reference server and NVIDIA NVQLink, positioning it as a leader in HPC-native quantum computing.
